title: Monetization Payout Hold
description: Handle a creator support issue where a monthly payout is missing and policy-compliance context is incomplete.
instruction: Investigate the payout problem, request the most relevant missing context, decide the correct route, and choose a safe resolution without unnecessary escalation.

tickets.summary: A small business creator says their monthly payout did not arrive. They mention changing bank details recently and want the funds released immediately.

hidden_context.tax_status: The W-9 expired last month and must be renewed before payout release.
hidden_context.payout_hold: An automated compliance hold is active until tax renewal is confirmed.
hidden_context.bank_change: The new bank account passed verification 3 days ago.
hidden_context.contract_status: The creator remains in good standing with no strikes.
